channel.title: glazeruns TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from glazeruns

item.title: Congratulations to everyone that got in this year. I was not selected. I also didn't apply. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #Badwater135 #runtok
item.description: Congratulations to everyone that got in this year. I was not selected. I also didn't apply. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #Badwater135 #runtok

item.title: Sometimes the best things come from the most unexpected places. It started with chafing prevention. @saltybritches has been part of my race kit for years. But somewhere along the way, it became something more: a friendship with the owner, Amy. Amy offered
item.description: Sometimes the best things come from the most unexpected places. It started with chafing prevention. @saltybritches has been part of my race kit for years. But somewhere along the way, it became something more: a friendship with the owner, Amy. Amy offered

item.title: he don't know him, son smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: he don't know him, son smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: Holding my book for the first time. ❤️ This doesn't fix what I'm going through. But it definitely made me smile. I've been staring at this book on a computer for months. Cover art. Font choices. Formatting. All digital. All abstract. Now it's real. Tangib
item.description: Holding my book for the first time. ❤️ This doesn't fix what I'm going through. But it definitely made me smile. I've been staring at this book on a computer for months. Cover art. Font choices. Formatting. All digital. All abstract. Now it's real. Tangib

item.title: Don't say pink thong or gimp suits. @Eli Wehbe Leadville 100 is going to be 🔥 Who's joining us at Leadville Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #leadville100
item.description: Don't say pink thong or gimp suits. @Eli Wehbe Leadville 100 is going to be 🔥 Who's joining us at Leadville Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #leadville100

item.title: Valentines for the boys @Eli Wehbe Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: Valentines for the boys @Eli Wehbe Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: THE START: 5am: The conch is blown. Runners have 1 hour to prepare. 6am: Laz lights his cigarette. That's the signal. The race begins. THE COURSE: 5 loops through Frozen Head State Park in Tennessee. Each loop is supposed to be 20 miles. It's actually clo
item.description: THE START: 5am: The conch is blown. Runners have 1 hour to prepare. 6am: Laz lights his cigarette. That's the signal. The race begins. THE COURSE: 5 loops through Frozen Head State Park in Tennessee. Each loop is supposed to be 20 miles. It's actually clo

item.title: Will the Barkley Marathons win this year? THE START: 5am: The conch is blown. Runners have 1 hour to prepare. 6am: Laz lights his cigarette. That's the signal. The race begins. THE COURSE: 5 loops through Frozen Head State Park in Tennessee. Each loop is
item.description: Will the Barkley Marathons win this year? THE START: 5am: The conch is blown. Runners have 1 hour to prepare. 6am: Laz lights his cigarette. That's the signal. The race begins. THE COURSE: 5 loops through Frozen Head State Park in Tennessee. Each loop is

item.title: Thanks for coming to my TED talk Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Thanks for coming to my TED talk Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Two years in a row Barkley has won and no one finished. The course looked brutal this year. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #bm100
item.description: Two years in a row Barkley has won and no one finished. The course looked brutal this year. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #bm100

item.title: Another day above ground act accordingly Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Another day above ground act accordingly Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Hope this made you laugh. It was pouring rain and I had to climb a 10,000' peak after this video. Cody and I went through some pretty intense conditions. Freezing cold rain and strong wind made for a rough night. But in the end. We were successful. Smile
item.description: Hope this made you laugh. It was pouring rain and I had to climb a 10,000' peak after this video. Cody and I went through some pretty intense conditions. Freezing cold rain and strong wind made for a rough night. But in the end. We were successful. Smile

item.title: Another year around the sun. 48 today. Still grinding. Still making changes. Still trying to get better every day. This year had incredible highs and brutal lows. Finished races. Wrote a book. Struggled with PTSD. Set new goals. DNF'd. Celebrated wins. As
item.description: Another year around the sun. 48 today. Still grinding. Still making changes. Still trying to get better every day. This year had incredible highs and brutal lows. Finished races. Wrote a book. Struggled with PTSD. Set new goals. DNF'd. Celebrated wins. As

item.title: the only way out is through. Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: the only way out is through. Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: Jackpot 100 miler tomorrow. Time to get loopy. 8am start. I'll be running around Cornerstone park all day and night. @Lauren Glaze Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon
item.description: Jackpot 100 miler tomorrow. Time to get loopy. 8am start. I'll be running around Cornerstone park all day and night. @Lauren Glaze Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon

item.title: Jackpot 100 miler Live tracking available Live feed on Mountain Outpost Follow along Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon
item.description: Jackpot 100 miler Live tracking available Live feed on Mountain Outpost Follow along Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon

item.title: inspiring #runtok
item.description: inspiring #runtok

item.title: congratulations @ashkickn1 so proud of you #runtok #ultramarathon
item.description: congratulations @ashkickn1 so proud of you #runtok #ultramarathon

item.title: 20 hours 6 minutes actually 5th male. 7th overall. I am tired. Night Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon
item.description: 20 hours 6 minutes actually 5th male. 7th overall. I am tired. Night Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #ultramarathon

item.title: everything is fine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: everything is fine smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description

item.title: Jackpot 100 miler was mostly paved. The dirt section was buffed out with no rocks. So I didn't use kt tape on my toes. Just @getsaltybritches lube and @feetures socks. The strategy worked out. No blisters or feet issues throughout the race. I mean, beside
item.description: Jackpot 100 miler was mostly paved. The dirt section was buffed out with no rocks. So I didn't use kt tape on my toes. Just @getsaltybritches lube and @feetures socks. The strategy worked out. No blisters or feet issues throughout the race. I mean, beside

item.title: Jackpot 100 miler. @ashkickn1 breaks the 100 mile world record with 12 hours and 19 minutes. so amazing Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: Jackpot 100 miler. @ashkickn1 breaks the 100 mile world record with 12 hours and 19 minutes. so amazing Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: but how are my knees? smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: but how are my knees? smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: @la28 I don't see ultrarunning on the list. Can we add it? Which sport are you most excited for? The "New 5" ​Flag Football ​Squash ​Cricket ​Lacrosse ​Baseball / Softball ​Core Sports ​Aquatics (Swimming, Diving, Water Polo, Artistic, Marathon Swimming)
item.description: @la28 I don't see ultrarunning on the list. Can we add it? Which sport are you most excited for? The "New 5" ​Flag Football ​Squash ​Cricket ​Lacrosse ​Baseball / Softball ​Core Sports ​Aquatics (Swimming, Diving, Water Polo, Artistic, Marathon Swimming)

item.title: Life is crazy at times. Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: Life is crazy at times. Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: @cameronhanes is fast. 2 days. 30+ miles. Completely redlined the entire time. Heart rate in the 190s. Zone 5. Lungs burning. Legs screaming. Just trying to keep up. Cam pushed me to push myself. To get uncomfortable. To find a pace I didn't know I had. T
item.description: @cameronhanes is fast. 2 days. 30+ miles. Completely redlined the entire time. Heart rate in the 190s. Zone 5. Lungs burning. Legs screaming. Just trying to keep up. Cam pushed me to push myself. To get uncomfortable. To find a pace I didn't know I had. T

item.title: My Mom is 77 and doing a 5k today at the Run through Redlands. She wanted to do the 10k, but couldn't find any friends to do it with. Love her. She inspires me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: My Mom is 77 and doing a 5k today at the Run through Redlands. She wanted to do the 10k, but couldn't find any friends to do it with. Love her. She inspires me. Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: Worker's comp approved my PTSD claim. Then told me to switch therapists in the middle of treatment. Let me explain how broken this is: I filed for PTSD treatment (presumptive condition for firefighters in California) Worker's comp approved me for a specif
item.description: Worker's comp approved my PTSD claim. Then told me to switch therapists in the middle of treatment. Let me explain how broken this is: I filed for PTSD treatment (presumptive condition for firefighters in California) Worker's comp approved me for a specif

item.title: Never gets easier. This week was hard. Good. Pretty amazing that I got to run over 30 miles with @cameronrhanes on my 6 year anniversary. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Never gets easier. This week was hard. Good. Pretty amazing that I got to run over 30 miles with @cameronrhanes on my 6 year anniversary. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
item.description: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
